probe_description: Exercises the real airframe sweep path: createRuntimeTerrainProbe(terrain).sweep(from, to) -> terrain.raycastTerrain() -> LOSAccelerator.checkLineOfSight(). A BoxGeometry mesh (20x20x20 centered at world (100, 10, 0)) stands in for a main_airbase hangar; a (8x50x8 at (200, 25, 0)) mesh stands in for a comms tower.

before.setup: LOSAccelerator populated only with terrain chunks (no static obstacles). This is the pre-fix behavior.

sweep_level_with_hangar.verdict: phase-through: aircraft clips through hangar undetected

sweep_level_with_tower.verdict: phase-through: aircraft clips through tower undetected

after.setup: LOSAccelerator populated with terrain chunks + static obstacles registered via LOSAccelerator.registerStaticObstacle('main_airbase_hangar', mesh) and .registerStaticObstacle('main_airbase_tower', mesh).

sweep_level_with_hangar.verdict: PASS: sweep reports contact at hangar near face

sweep_above_hangar.verdict: PASS: sweep above the roof correctly misses

sweep_into_tower_above_hangar_roof.verdict: PASS: tower is collidable above hangar height

deregistration.scenario: after unregisterStaticObstacle('transient_hangar'), the same sweep returns null

notes: The fix adds LOSAccelerator.registerStaticObstacle / unregisterStaticObstacle which share the same internal chunkCache the terrain BVH uses; no new spatial data structure.
WorldFeatureSystem.spawnFeature registers every collidable mesh whose horizontal footprint exceeds BUILDING_LOS_MIN_FOOTPRINT_M=3m, excluding small props (barrels, crates, fuel drums).
The aircraft sweep already routes through raycastTerrain via createRuntimeTerrainProbe; no airframe-side code changed.
Probe is deterministic and reproducible via the vitest suite; no Playwright browser capture required.
